data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Root cause: git merge-base --is-ancestor returns true when HEAD resolves to the worktree branch itself — happens when harvest is invoked with cwd inside the worktree (orchestrator's cd to session root was missed, e.g., after compact). Fix: add preflight at line 108 — resolve WORKTREE_BRANCH and HEAD to SHAs, error if equal, error if HEAD's symbolic ref == refs/heads/WORKTREE_BRANCH, error if branch ref missing. Medium confidence. DEFERRED: test-harvest-worktree.sh is flaky in test-batched.sh (blocks commit pipeline); commits on harvest-worktree.sh are currently blocked until the flakiness is resolved. User approval to either (a) fix test flakiness first, or (b) apply with a temporary RED marker.
